artifact_role: Decision support and shared certificate schema for the single RECOVERY-CERTIFICATION lane. It does not establish recovery, change claim grade, or authorize external action.

score_scale.impact: 1 is marginal to the GU bet; 5 would materially change the overall assessment.
score_scale.completion_difficulty: 1 is routine; 5 requires major new mathematical or physical construction.
score_scale.completion_readiness: 1 lacks a necessary upstream object; 5 can be attacked from current repo evidence.
score_scale.first_test_difficulty: Difficulty of the next decisive falsification or underdefinition test, not of completing the claim.
score_scale.first_test_readiness: Readiness of that next test using current repo objects.
score_scale.dependency_leverage: 1 affects only this item; 5 clarifies or unlocks several downstream items.

shared_setup.remaining_contract_work: Populate one construction identity manifest and resolve the named action and branch conflicts. The schema is complete; the construction is not frozen.

definitions.native: Produced by the frozen GU construction rather than inserted at an interface or selected from target physics.
definitions.forced: Invariant under every admitted free parameter, quotient representative, branch choice, and completion in the frozen construction.
definitions.external_datum: Supplied by p2c, experiment, a boundary condition, or another owner and kept visibly conditional.
definitions.calibration_datum: Information used to select, fit, normalize, or tune the relation or its adjudication procedure.
definitions.target_datum: Information used to test the frozen relation.
definitions.holdout: Target information unavailable to the construction and calibration chain at freeze time.
definitions.retuning: Any post-freeze change to the construction, parameters, observable map, uncertainty model, competitor, or decision threshold.
definitions.distinctive: Not reproducible by the declared competitor with equal or fewer relevant adjustable freedoms.
definitions.independent_adapter: An adapter whose premises do not depend on the GU consequence it is intended to enable.

recovery_ladder.meaning: No typed candidate object has been identified in the frozen construction.
A typed carrier, subgroup, field slot, or candidate object is present.
The desired representation or solution can be embedded after explicit choices, without dynamical selection.
The same frozen equations select the sector and preserve it under evolution without sector-specific repair.
The physical quotient, positivity, locality, anomaly control, and unitary or state-preserving dynamics are established at the claimed scope.
Benchmark observables follow from the frozen construction with an explicit uncertainty and comparison protocol.
A native, fixed, distinctive quantitative relation survives a preregistered independent holdout confrontation without retuning.

required_fields: free, fitted, conventional, and imported quantities
reduction map to each tested sector

known_variant_conflicts.issue: The typed interface records one operator spine and several incompatible action and IG branches rather than one source-closed primary theory.

W203 is an ultralocal W154-conditional action with Z_U unbuilt, while W229 and W230 distinguish nonzero stiffness and exact pointwise response. W236 must be fingerprinted against one consistent version before its gravity evidence is combined.

claim_chain_acceptance_tests: adapter packet rejects missing provenance or conditions
adapter packet rejects circular premise edges
fixed quantity rejects any free tangent that changes the observable
blind preregistration rejects post-data freeze or a missing kill threshold
blind preregistration rejects an equal-freedom standard mimic
claim-chain hashes link adapter to fixed quantity to preregistration

negative_controls.reason: A Pati-Salam or Standard Model subgroup does not select the physical low-energy sector.
An indefinite arena, grading sign, or formal BRST complex is not a positive physical Hilbert space.
Imported Schwarzschild or Kerr compatibility does not derive Einstein dynamics.
PPN values obtained after granting G=T test the assumed GR reduction rather than deriving it.
A fitted or compatible H(z) background with fixed early physics does not recover perturbations.
Two free dimensionless flavor ratios remain.
Quotient invariants survive but no native absolute scale is fixed.
A normalization audit is not a distinctive prediction.
A one-sided survival ceiling is not a positive prediction.
GU-002 tests packet provenance but is not evidence that a boundary adapter exists.

items.current_honest_ceiling: The shared definitions, ladder, evidence record, and negative controls are now schema-complete. No single construction identity is frozen.
items.first_decisive_test: Pin one revision and determine whether every sector consumes the same action, operator, variation space, boundary assumptions, adapter axiom, and parameter set.
items.kill_condition: If the sector claims require incompatible branches or assumption sets, the unified-recovery claim fails at the current construction grade.
items.next_after_setup: Populate the construction manifest and resolve PRIMARY-ACTION-VARIANTS and ULTRALOCAL-VS-STIFFNESS without merging them by relabeling.

items.current_honest_ceiling: GU can define the receiving contract. No independently constructed adapter return exists in GU.
items.first_decisive_test: On a frozen p2c return, verify provenance, premise-DAG independence, interface typing, explicit Proposition 1 and record-bit conditions, and zero sector-specific retuning.
items.kill_condition: A circular premise edge, hidden condition, interface mismatch, or GU retuning fails independent-adapter certification.
items.next_after_setup: Wait for a frozen p2c packet. Do not construct the adapter in GU.

items.current_honest_ceiling: Finite-dimensional and perturbative Krein or BRST controls exist, but no source-derived physical QFT state space, positive state, observables, or unitary interacting dynamics is extracted.
items.first_decisive_test: Under one named adapter axiom, instantiate the physical field complex and BRST quotient from the frozen construction, then stop at the first undefined certificate object before claiming positivity or unitarity.
items.kill_condition: Failure of the physical complex, quotient, positivity, locality, or state-preserving dynamics kills that conditional realization; success remains adapter-capped.
items.next_after_setup: Populate stages 1 and 2 of the QFT shadow certificate from the frozen manifest before attempting the interacting C metric.
gates: unconditional closure requires p2c adapter return

items.current_honest_ceiling: The carrier hosts a Pati-Salam branch and relative Standard Model charge packet, but no target-free selector, chiral low-energy closure, physical Higgs projection, or full unwanted-mode decoupling is derived.
items.first_decisive_test: Run a target-free selector and physical-spectrum screen for the exact gauge quotient, hypercharge normalization, chiral 16, breaking mechanism, Higgs projection, all surviving modes, and anomaly status.
items.kill_condition: Host-only subgroup or representation evidence without a dynamically selected, anomaly-safe, correctly coupled observer sector fails complete Standard Model recovery.
items.next_after_setup: Apply the extraction ledger to the frozen manifest and return the first selector or closure failure without importing the Standard Model target.

items.current_honest_ceiling: Imported Schwarzschild and Kerr pass linear compatibility checks. PPN matches GR only after granting Einstein dynamics. A nonzero O(M^2) native residual and action-fingerprint conflict remain.
items.first_decisive_test: Reconcile W229, W230, and W236 into one action fingerprint, then preregister the full O(M^2) Schwarzschild cancellation test with forced coefficients and controls.
items.kill_condition: A nonzero uncancellable O(M^2) residual kills exact GR recovery for the frozen branch. A cancellation tuned after inspecting Schwarzschild does not count.
items.next_after_setup: Freeze the action and OQ2 functional, then compute whether native YM and source terms cancel Q(B) at O(M^2).

items.current_honest_ceiling: Background Friedmann and Klein-Gordon calculations exist with fixed early physics, but the scalar field type, consistent truncation, SVT action, stability, growth, lensing, and transfer functions are not derived.
items.first_decisive_test: Decompose s*(theta) under FLRW spatial rotations and determine whether a physical scalar singlet exists and can form a consistent truncation of the frozen action.
items.kill_condition: No scalar singlet or no closed scalar truncation means the current theta-background Klein-Gordon equation is the wrong physical equation, not merely an incomplete perturbation treatment.
items.next_after_setup: Run the field-type decomposition before attempting the full scalar-vector-tensor quadratic action.
gates: full perturbations require frozen native dynamics

items.current_honest_ceiling: No current candidate passes native, quantitative, calibration-independent, distinctive, and testable criteria. Flavor and normalization routes reached negative endpoints.
items.first_decisive_test: When new native structure appears, quotient gauge and representation directions and test whether every residual solution-space tangent annihilates the proposed observable relation.
items.kill_condition: Any admitted free direction, external calibration, fitted normalization, or scheme ambiguity that changes the relation kills fixedness.
items.next_after_setup: Wait for a genuinely new native constraint. Do not rerun closed flavor or normalization routes without one.
gates: new native constraint or independently derived normalization

items.current_honest_ceiling: No valid frozen GU relation exists to preregister or confront. Existing diagnostics, compatibility checks, and tripwires do not qualify.
items.first_decisive_test: After a fixed-quantity certificate exists, freeze construction and code hashes, observable, uncertainty model, competitor, target release, and pass, kill, and downgrade thresholds before accessing holdout results.
items.kill_condition: Target calibration, post-result retuning, equal-freedom standard mimicry, or failed holdout kills the blind distinctive prediction claim.
items.next_after_setup: Remain gated until FIXED-NATIVE-QUANTITY produces a certificate. Do not confront DESI, Euclid, PDG, or collider targets first.

recommended_quick_order_after_shared_set.why: Every later result is unsafe to combine until this is fixed.

recommended_quick_order_after_shared_set.why: Highly ready and likely to return a sharp host-versus-physical-sector classification.
Decisive for exact GR recovery after the action fingerprint is frozen.

recommended_quick_order_after_shared_set.test: Instantiate the physical field complex and BRST quotient
recommended_quick_order_after_shared_set.why: High impact but currently assumption-capped and more likely to stop at a missing source-defined object.
